import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class NLinear(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, seq_len=96, pred_len=720, num_features=7, individual=False):
        super().__init__()
        self.seq_len = seq_len
        self.pred_len = pred_len
        self.num_features = num_features
        self.individual = individual
        if self.individual:
            self.linear = nn.ModuleList([
                nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(num_features)
            ])
        else:
            self.linear = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)

    def forward(self, x):
        # x: [B, seq_len, D]
        last = x[:, -1:, :]  # [B, 1, D]
        shifted = x - last
        if self.individual:
            outputs = []
            for i in range(self.num_features):
                out = self.linear[i](shifted[:, :, i])  # [B, pred_len]
                outputs.append(out.unsqueeze(-1))
            pred = torch.cat(outputs, dim=-1)  # [B, pred_len, D]
        else:
            shifted_t = shifted.permute(0, 2, 1)  # [B, D, seq_len]
            pred = self.linear(shifted_t)  # [B, D, pred_len]
            pred = pred.permute(0, 2, 1)  # [B, pred_len, D]
        return pred + last


class moving_avg(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, kernel_size, stride=1):
        super().__init__()
        self.kernel_size = kernel_size
        self.avg = nn.AvgPool1d(kernel_size=kernel_size, stride=stride, padding=0)

    def forward(self, x):
        B, T, D = x.shape
        front = x[:, 0:1, :].expand(-1, (self.kernel_size-1)//2, -1)
        back = x[:, -1:, :].expand(-1, self.kernel_size - 1 - (self.kernel_size-1)//2, -1)
        x_pad = torch.cat([front, x, back], dim=1)
        x_pad = x_pad.permute(0, 2, 1)
        avg_out = self.avg(x_pad)
        start = (avg_out.shape[-1] - T) // 2
        avg_out = avg_out[:, :, start:start+T]
        return avg_out.permute(0, 2, 1)


class DLinear(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, seq_len=96, pred_len=720, num_features=7, individual=False, kernel_size=25):
        super().__init__()
        self.seq_len = seq_len
        self.pred_len = pred_len
        self.num_features = num_features
        self.individual = individual
        self.moving_avg = moving_avg(kernel_size)
        if self.individual:
            self.linear_trend = nn.ModuleList([
                nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(num_features)
            ])
            self.linear_seasonal = nn.ModuleList([
                nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len) for _ in range(num_features)
            ])
        else:
            self.linear_trend = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)
            self.linear_seasonal = nn.Linear(seq_len, pred_len)

    def forward(self, x):
        trend = self.moving_avg(x)
        seasonal = x - trend
        B, T, D = x.shape
        if self.individual:
            trend_out = []
            seasonal_out = []
            for i in range(D):
                t_out = self.linear_trend[i](trend[:, :, i]).unsqueeze(-1)
                s_out = self.linear_seasonal[i](seasonal[:, :, i]).unsqueeze(-1)
                trend_out.append(t_out)
                seasonal_out.append(s_out)
            trend_out = torch.cat(trend_out, dim=-1)
            seasonal_out = torch.cat(seasonal_out, dim=-1)
        else:
            trend_t = trend.permute(0, 2, 1)
            seasonal_t = seasonal.permute(0, 2, 1)
            trend_out = self.linear_trend(trend_t).permute(0, 2, 1)
            seasonal_out = self.linear_seasonal(seasonal_t).permute(0, 2, 1)
        return trend_out + seasonal_out
